svg.text: All services implemented and running · Ports are default dev/Docker values
Authentication · Patient Context Sync · Navigation · Role-based Module Loader · JWT Interceptor · Session Management
Port 5000 · Single entry point for all /api/* traffic
JWT validation · Request routing · /health/deep · Swagger /api-docs · AI routes /api/ai/*
DB_ADAPTER env var → selects adapter at startup (default: mongo)
patient · vitals · labs · medications · visits · care-team · clinical-notes · registry — zero handler changes to swap DB
patients · vitals · labs · medications · visits · care-team · clinical-notes
New /api/ai/* routes added to existing API Gateway · AI services are peer microservices · No changes to core domain services
Assembles full patient context · Calls domain services · LLM tool-calling loop · Delegates to specialist agents
Aggregates recommendations · All results require physician review before any action (Human-in-the-Loop)
Identifies gaps in patient data · Prioritises urgent orders
Used by Orchestrator and Specialist Agents
Frontend ports: Shell 4200 · Demographics 4201 · Vitals 4202 · Labs 4203 · Medications 4204 · Visits 4205 · Care Team 4206 · Procedures 4207 · AI Insights 4208 · Clinical Notes 4209

Backend ports: Gateway 5000 · Auth 5001 · Patient 5002 · Vitals 5003 · Labs 5004 · Medications 5005 · Visits 5006 · Care Team 5007 · AI Orchestrator 5008 · Medication Agent 5009 · Labs Agent 5010 · Comms Agent 5011 · Clinical Notes 5012 · LLM Agent 5013 · Registry 5100 · MongoDB 27017 · Redis 6379
